figures.caption: Figure 3: Comparison of POOL and grid-based discretization. Left: relative optimality gap; Right: running time. POOL consistently achieves lower gaps and faster computation across datasets.

Figure 2: Impact of key hyperparameters on relative optimality gap. Top-left: Horizon length H . Top-right: Feedback parameter |λ|. Bottom-left: State-action dimensionality w + d. Bottom-right: Discretization granularity M . Error bars indicate standard deviations.
